tree.text: It's 9:00 a.m. on Saturday. I am having a walk in the East Lake Park.

children.text: The sun is shining brightly, so the weather is perfect for outdoor activities.
children.keywords: sun, shining brightly, perfect, outdoor activities

children.text: There are many people doing different kinds of things here.
For example, while some people are exercising, an old man is walking a dog slowly.
children.keywords: exercising, old man, walking a dog, slowly

children.text: In addition, a young man is playing the guitar beautifully under a big tree.
children.keywords: young man, playing, guitar, beautifully, tree

children.text: Not far away, some children are flying colourful kites happily, and some boys are playing an exciting football match.
children.keywords: children, flying kites, happily, boys, playing, football

children.text: Seeing all these wonderful activities, I feel very relaxed because everyone is enjoying a wonderful weekend.
children.keywords: Seeing, wonderful activities, relaxed, everyone, enjoying, weekend
